home.title: telepace — Voice-native, Agent-first user research infrastructure
home.description: telepace runs voice interviews with your users on autopilot — and hands the structured insights back to your agent, so it can act on them.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Simple pricing that scales with your research — free tier, Pro, and Team. No card required to start.

docs.title: Docs
docs.description: Quickstarts, core concepts, and integration guides for telepace.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: The telepace MCP server: stateful research tools for any MCP-compatible agent.

productAgent.title: Agent
productAgent.description: Designer, Interviewer, Analyst, Coordinator — four agents that run research end to end.

productVoice.title: Voice
productVoice.description: Voice interviews in the browser, by phone, or on a hotline — natural turn-taking, ten languages.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join the team building voice-native user research for the agent era.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.description: Product releases and improvements, in the open.

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: The terms that govern your use of telepace.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: What we collect, how we use it, and the rights you keep.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: How product teams use telepace to put customer voice behind every decision.

security.title: Security
security.description: How telepace protects your data: tenant isolation, encryption, and PII redaction.

demo.title: Live demo
demo.description: Try a 60-second live interview with telepace's AI researcher — no signup required.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Create a telepace account — free tier includes 3 studies a month, no card required.

newStudy.title: New study
newStudy.description: Describe your research goal and shape it into a publishable study with the agent.

studies.title: Studies
studies.description: Manage your voice interview studies — drafts, live, and finished.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.description: Ask across your studies and get answers backed by evidence.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Themes pulled from every interview across your studies, each backed by what people actually said.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Everything that needs a human — escalations, new insights, and study progress in one place.

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Manage who telepace can talk to for you: segments, imported lists, and how they respond.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage workspace preferences, members, billing, API keys, and MCP access.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect telepace to Notion, Linear, Slack, webhooks, and your model providers.
